/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libformation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libformation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/formation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/formation_interfaces/msg/leader_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formation_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/formation_interfaces/msg/drone_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/abdoulaziz/swarm/formation_ws/build/formation_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libformation_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
